frontmatter.title: 練習問題メモ 11（行列式の幾何学的意味）

children.html: (456)×(123)\left(\begin{array}{lll} 4 & 5 & 6 \end{array}\right) \times \left(\begin{array}{lll} 1 & 2 & 3 \end{array}\right)(4​5​6​)×(1​2​3​)

a×b=(∣a2a3b2b3∣,−∣a1a3b1b3∣,∣a1a2b1b2∣)=(a2b3−a3b2, a3b1−a1b3, a1b2−a2b1)\boldsymbol{a} \times \boldsymbol{b} = \left(\left|\begin{array}{ll} a_2 & a_3 \\ b_2 & b_3 \end{array}\right|,-\left|\begin{array}{ll} a_1 & a_3 \\ b_1 & b_3 \end{array}\right|,\left|\begin{array}{ll} a_1 & a_2 \\ b_1 & b_2 \end{array}\right|\right) = ( a_2 b_3 - a_3 b_2, \ a_3 b_1 - a_1 b_3,\ a_1 b_2 - a_2 b_1 )a×b=(∣∣​a2​b2​​a3​b3​​∣∣​,−∣∣​a1​b1​​a3​b3​​∣∣​,∣∣​a1​b1​​a2​b2​​∣∣​)=(a2​b3​−a3​b2​, a3​b1​−a1​b3​, a1​b2​−a2​b1​)

(456)×(123)=(15−126−128−5)=(3−63)\left(\begin{array}{lll} 4 & 5 & 6 \end{array}\right) \times \left(\begin{array}{lll} 1 & 2 & 3 \end{array}\right) = \begin{pmatrix} 15 - 12 \\ 6 - 12\\ 8 - 5 \end{pmatrix} = \begin{pmatrix} 3 \\ -6\\ 3 \end{pmatrix}(4​5​6​)×(1​2​3​)=⎝⎛​15−126−128−5​⎠⎞​=⎝⎛​3−63​⎠⎞​

children.value:
import numpy as np
a = [4, 5, 6]
b = [1, 2, 3]
np.cross(a, b)

children.html: (cos⁡θsin⁡θ),(sin⁡θ−cos⁡θ)\left(\begin{array}{ll} \cos \theta & \sin \theta \end{array}\right), \left(\begin{array}{ll} \sin \theta & -\cos \theta \end{array}\right)(cosθ​sinθ​),(sinθ​−cosθ​)

children.value: を二辺とする平行四辺形の面積を求めよ。

children.html: a,ba,ba,b

children.value: を2辺とする平行四辺形の面積は行列式

children.html: ∣a,b∣|a,b|∣a,b∣

children.value: の絶対値に合致するという定理により

children.html: a=(cos⁡θsin⁡θ),b=(sin⁡θ−cos⁡θ)a = \left(\begin{array}{ll} \cos \theta & \sin \theta \end{array}\right), b = \left(\begin{array}{ll} \sin \theta & -\cos \theta \end{array}\right)a=(cosθ​sinθ​),b=(sinθ​−cosθ​)

∣det(ab)∣=∣cos⁡θ×(−cos⁡θ)−sin⁡2θ∣=∣−cos⁡2θ−sin⁡2θ∣=∣−(cos⁡2θ+sin⁡2θ)∣=1\begin{align} |\text{det} (\begin{array}{ll} a & b \end{array})| &= |\cos \theta \times (-\cos \theta) - \sin^2 \theta|\\ &= |-\cos^2 \theta - \sin^2 \theta|\\ &= |-(\cos^2 \theta + \sin^2 \theta)|\\ &= 1\\ \end{align}∣det(a​b​)∣​=∣cosθ×(−cosθ)−sin2θ∣=∣−cos2θ−sin2θ∣=∣−(cos2θ+sin2θ)∣=1​​
yyy
rrr
sin⁡θ=y/r→y=r×sin⁡θ\sin \theta = y / r \to y = r \times \sin \thetasinθ=y/r→y=r×sinθ
y=∥b∥sin⁡θy = \|b\| \sin \thetay=∥b∥sinθ
SSS
S=∥a∥∥b∥sin⁡θS = \|a\| \|b\| \sin \thetaS=∥a∥∥b∥sinθ
S2=∥a∥2∥b∥2sin⁡2θS^2 = \|a\|^2 \|b\|^2 \sin^2 \thetaS2=∥a∥2∥b∥2sin2θ

sin⁡2θ=1−cos⁡2θ(∵sin⁡2θ+cos⁡2θ=1)sin⁡2θ=1−(a⋅b∥a∥∥b∥)2(∵cos⁡2θ=a⋅b∥a∥∥b∥)sin⁡2θ=1−(a⋅b)2∥a∥2∥b∥2\begin{align} \sin^2 \theta &= 1 - \cos^2 \theta \quad (\because \sin^2 \theta + \cos^2 \theta = 1) \\ \sin^2 \theta &= 1 - \left(\frac{ a \cdot b }{\|a\| \|b\|}\right)^2 \quad (\because \cos^2 \theta = \frac{ a \cdot b }{\|a\| \|b\|}) \\ \sin^2 \theta &= 1 - \frac{ (a \cdot b)^2 }{\|a\|^2 \|b\|^2}\\ \end{align}sin2θsin2θsin2θ​=1−cos2θ(∵sin2θ+cos2θ=1)=1−(∥a∥∥b∥a⋅b​)2(∵cos2θ=∥a∥∥b∥a⋅b​)=1−∥a∥2∥b∥2(a⋅b)2​​​

S2=∥a∥2∥b∥2(1−(a⋅b)2∥a∥2∥b∥2)=∥a∥2∥b∥2−(a⋅b)2=(a12+a22)(b12+b22)−(a1b1+a2b2)2=a12b12+a12b22+a22b12+a22b22−(a1b1)2−(a2b2)2−2(a1b1a2b2)=a12b22+a22b12−2(a1b1a2b2)=(a1b2−a1b2)2\begin{align} S^2 &= \|a\|^2 \|b\|^2 \left(1 - \frac{ (a \cdot b)^2 }{\|a\|^2 \|b\|^2} \right)\\ &= \|a\|^2 \|b\|^2 - (a \cdot b)^2\\ &= (a_1^2 + a_2^2)(b_1^2 + b_2^2) - (a_1 b_1 + a_2 b_2)^2\\ &= a_1^2 b_1^2 + a_1^2 b_2^2 + a_2^2 b_1^2 + a_2^2 b_2^2 - (a_1 b_1)^2 - (a_2 b_2)^2 - 2 (a_1 b_1 a_2 b_2)\\ &= a_1^2 b_2^2 + a_2^2 b_1^2 - 2 (a_1 b_1 a_2 b_2)\\ &= (a_1 b_2 - a_1 b_2)^2\\ \end{align}S2​=∥a∥2∥b∥2(1−∥a∥2∥b∥2(a⋅b)2​)=∥a∥2∥b∥2−(a⋅b)2=(a12​+a22​)(b12​+b22​)−(a1​b1​+a2​b2​)2=a12​b12​+a12​b22​+a22​b12​+a22​b22​−(a1​b1​)2−(a2​b2​)2−2(a1​b1​a2​b2​)=a12​b22​+a22​b12​−2(a1​b1​a2​b2​)=(a1​b2​−a1​b2​)2​​
S=a1b2−a1b2S = a_1 b_2 - a_1 b_2S=a1​b2​−a1​b2​

children.value: を互いに異なる数とする。空間ベクトル

children.html: (111),(abc),(a2b2c2)\left(\begin{array}{lll}1 & 1 & 1\end{array}\right),\left(\begin{array}{lll}a & b & c\end{array}\right),\left(\begin{array}{lll}a^2 & b^2 & c^2\end{array}\right)(1​1​1​),(a​b​c​),(a2​b2​c2​)

children.value: を三辺とする平行六面体の体積を求めよ。

\left|\begin{array}{ccc}
1 & a & a^2\\
1 & b & b^2\\
1 & c & c^2
\end{array}\right|
= (c - a) (c - b) (b - a)
children.html: ∣1aa21bb21cc2∣=(c−a)(c−b)(b−a)\left|\begin{array}{ccc} 1 & a & a^2\\ 1 & b & b^2\\ 1 & c & c^2 \end{array}\right| = (c - a) (c - b) (b - a)∣∣​111​abc​a2b2c2​∣∣​=(c−a)(c−b)(b−a)
⟨a×b,c⟩\langle a \times b, c \rangle⟨a×b,c⟩

children.value: の形で平行六面体の体積を求めてもOK

children.html: a,b,c,da, b, c, da,b,c,d

children.value: を空間ベクトルとする。次の 1、2 が成り立つことを示せ。

children.html: ⟨a×b,c⟩=⟨b×c,a⟩=⟨c×a,b⟩\langle\boldsymbol{a} \times \boldsymbol{b}, \boldsymbol{c}\rangle=\langle\boldsymbol{b} \times \boldsymbol{c}, \boldsymbol{a}\rangle=\langle\boldsymbol{c} \times \boldsymbol{a}, \boldsymbol{b}\rangle⟨a×b,c⟩=⟨b×c,a⟩=⟨c×a,b⟩

(a×b)×c=⟨a,c⟩b−⟨b,c⟩a(\boldsymbol{a} \times \boldsymbol{b}) \times \boldsymbol{c}=\langle\boldsymbol{a}, \boldsymbol{c}\rangle \boldsymbol{b}-\langle\boldsymbol{b}, \boldsymbol{c}\rangle \boldsymbol{a}(a×b)×c=⟨a,c⟩b−⟨b,c⟩a

children.value: 1 や 2 から、さらに次の式を導くことができる。

children.html: (a×b)×c+(b×c)×a+(c×a)×b=0 (ヤコビの恒等式） ⟨a×b,c×d⟩=⟨a,c⟩⟨b,d⟩−⟨a,d⟩⟨b,c⟩ (ラグランジュの公式） \begin{array}{lc} (a \times b) \times c+(b \times c) \times a+(c \times a) \times b=0 & \text { (ヤコビの恒等式） } \\ \langle a \times b, c \times d\rangle=\langle a, c\rangle\langle b, d\rangle-\langle a, d\rangle\langle b, c\rangle \quad \text { (ラグランジュの公式） } \end{array}(a×b)×c+(b×c)×a+(c×a)×b=0⟨a×b,c×d⟩=⟨a,c⟩⟨b,d⟩−⟨a,d⟩⟨b,c⟩ (ラグランジュの公式） ​ (ヤコビの恒等式）

⟨a×b,c⟩=⟨b×c,a⟩=⟨c×a,b⟩\langle\boldsymbol{a} \times \boldsymbol{b}, \boldsymbol{c}\rangle=\langle\boldsymbol{b} \times \boldsymbol{c}, \boldsymbol{a}\rangle=\langle\boldsymbol{c} \times \boldsymbol{a}, \boldsymbol{b}\rangle⟨a×b,c⟩=⟨b×c,a⟩=⟨c×a,b⟩

children.value:
\begin{align}
((\boldsymbol{a} \times \boldsymbol{b})\times \boldsymbol{c})_1
&= (\boldsymbol{a} \times \boldsymbol{b})_2 c_3 - (\boldsymbol{a} \times \boldsymbol{b})_3 c_2\\
&= a_3 b_1 c_3 - a_1 b_3 c_3 - a_1 b_2 c_2 + a_2 b_1 c_2\\
&= (a_2 c_2 + a_3 c_3) b_1 - (b_2 c_2 + b_3 c_3) a_1\\
&= (a_1 c_1 + a_2 c_2 + a_3 c_3) b_1 - (b_1 c_1 + b_2 c_2 + b_3 c_3) a_1 \quad (a_1 b_1 c_1 - a_1 b_1 c_1を足した)\\
&= \langle \boldsymbol{a}, \boldsymbol{c} \rangle b_1 - \langle \boldsymbol{b}, \boldsymbol{c} \rangle a_1
\end{align}
children.html: ((a×b)×c)1=(a×b)2c3−(a×b)3c2=a3b1c3−a1b3c3−a1b2c2+a2b1c2=(a2c2+a3c3)b1−(b2c2+b3c3)a1=(a1c1+a2c2+a3c3)b1−(b1c1+b2c2+b3c3)a1(a1b1c1−a1b1c1を足した)=⟨a,c⟩b1−⟨b,c⟩a1\begin{align} ((\boldsymbol{a} \times \boldsymbol{b})\times \boldsymbol{c})_1 &= (\boldsymbol{a} \times \boldsymbol{b})_2 c_3 - (\boldsymbol{a} \times \boldsymbol{b})_3 c_2\\ &= a_3 b_1 c_3 - a_1 b_3 c_3 - a_1 b_2 c_2 + a_2 b_1 c_2\\ &= (a_2 c_2 + a_3 c_3) b_1 - (b_2 c_2 + b_3 c_3) a_1\\ &= (a_1 c_1 + a_2 c_2 + a_3 c_3) b_1 - (b_1 c_1 + b_2 c_2 + b_3 c_3) a_1 \quad (a_1 b_1 c_1 - a_1 b_1 c_1を足した)\\ &= \langle \boldsymbol{a}, \boldsymbol{c} \rangle b_1 - \langle \boldsymbol{b}, \boldsymbol{c} \rangle a_1 \end{align}((a×b)×c)1​​=(a×b)2​c3​−(a×b)3​c2​=a3​b1​c3​−a1​b3​c3​−a1​b2​c2​+a2​b1​c2​=(a2​c2​+a3​c3​)b1​−(b2​c2​+b3​c3​)a1​=(a1​c1​+a2​c2​+a3​c3​)b1​−(b1​c1​+b2​c2​+b3​c3​)a1​(a1​b1​c1​−a1​b1​c1​を足した)=⟨a,c⟩b1​−⟨b,c⟩a1​​​

((a×b)×c)2=⟨a,c⟩b2−⟨b,c⟩a2((a×b)×c)3=⟨a,c⟩b3−⟨b,c⟩a3((\boldsymbol{a} \times \boldsymbol{b})\times \boldsymbol{c})_2 = \langle \boldsymbol{a}, \boldsymbol{c} \rangle b_2 - \langle \boldsymbol{b}, \boldsymbol{c} \rangle a_2\\ ((\boldsymbol{a} \times \boldsymbol{b})\times \boldsymbol{c})_3 = \langle \boldsymbol{a}, \boldsymbol{c} \rangle b_3 - \langle \boldsymbol{b}, \boldsymbol{c} \rangle a_3\\((a×b)×c)2​=⟨a,c⟩b2​−⟨b,c⟩a2​((a×b)×c)3​=⟨a,c⟩b3​−⟨b,c⟩a3​

(a×b)×c=⟨a,c⟩b−⟨b,c⟩a(\boldsymbol{a} \times \boldsymbol{b}) \times \boldsymbol{c} = \langle \boldsymbol{a}, \boldsymbol{c} \rangle \boldsymbol{b} - \langle \boldsymbol{b}, \boldsymbol{c} \rangle \boldsymbol{a}(a×b)×c=⟨a,c⟩b−⟨b,c⟩a

(b−a)×(c−a)⋅x−a=−3(x−1)−3(y−2)−3(z−3)=−3x+3−3y+6−3z+9=0→−3x−3y−3z=−18→x+y+z=6(\boldsymbol{b} - \boldsymbol{a}) \times (\boldsymbol{c} - \boldsymbol{a}) \cdot \boldsymbol{x} - \boldsymbol{a} = -3 (x - 1) - 3 (y - 2) - 3 (z - 3)\\ = -3 x + 3 - 3 y + 6 - 3z + 9 = 0\\ \to -3x - 3y -3z = -18\\ \to x + y + z = 6\\(b−a)×(c−a)⋅x−a=−3(x−1)−3(y−2)−3(z−3)=−3x+3−3y+6−3z+9=0→−3x−3y−3z=−18→x+y+z=6
